column1: # SRA test sample list for human WGS data.
# Format: TAB-separated, at least two columns
#   col2: sample_id (your label, used as the prefix of output files)
# Lines starting with # are skipped. Blank lines are skipped.
# - read_type must be set to PE or SE depending on the chosen accessions.
#   Most modern human WGS submissions on SRA are paired-end (PE).
# - For a fast smoke test, pick a small accession (< 5 GB) and a small interval_size
#   (e.g. 10M-50M) so the pipeline finishes in a reasonable time.
# - Add as many rows as you want; each row becomes one sample.
# Example rows (uncomment and edit; replace the placeholders):
